_note: SEED token estimates per skill, NOT measured facts. These are coarse priors used only until Skill Telemetry (#35) accumulates real per-skill averages — once it has >= `min_samples` runs for a skill, prefer the telemetry mean over the seed here. Token COUNTS may be estimated; PER-TOKEN PRICE must come from pricing.json (which is itself placeholder — see its _verify note). Update seeds as telemetry lands; record the source in `_source`.
_unit: tokens (input + output) for one typical run of the skill on a small/medium project

_telemetry._note: If telemetry.json exists and has >= min_samples runs for a skill, use its per-skill mean (input/output) instead of the seed below. Fall back to these seeds otherwise.

heuristics._note: Fallback when a skill has no seed and no telemetry. estimate = base + per_file_edited*files + per_template_generated*templates + per_plan_stage*stages.
heuristics._thinking_note: Adaptive thinking tokens bill as output. If a skill leans on heavy reasoning, raise this multiplier (e.g. 1.3) for its output estimate.

01_Master_Orchestrator._note: Coordination only; per-stage cost is the stage skill's, not this.

25_Context_Compression_Engine._note: Reads a lot, emits a compact summary — high input, low output.

30_Token_Budget_Governor._note: This skill: cheap; runs a script, reasons briefly.
